title: Uber 和 Waymo 结束了在凤凰城的 Robotaxi 合作；优步宣布新合作伙伴
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. said it has wound down its robotaxi offering with Alphabet Inc.’s Waymo in Phoenix, the latest relationship twist between two companies that simultaneously function as partners and competitors.（原题：Uber and Waymo Have Ended Their Robotaxi Tie-Up in Phoenix; Uber to Announce New Partner）

title: Bear Robotics 收购 Kinisi 背后的见解

title: AGIBOT生产第15,000台机器人，标志着实体人工智能部署的里程碑
